visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with a newsboy cap and glasses holds a white rectangular Apple box against a grey-blue studio background. He wears a green t-shirt and multiple wooden bracelets on his right wrist. (2) Close-up shot of his left wrist showing a large rugged smartwatch with a bright yellow sport band. (3) He unboxes the watch, revealing a silver titanium finish. He holds the watch face up to the camera. (4) He holds up two narrow white boxes showing blue and green fabric watch bands, then wears the blue one to show it on his wrist. (5) Top-down shot of two smartwatches on a textured grey surface, one labeled 'Ultra 3' and the other 'Ultra 2' with graphical overlays. (6) The man gestures toward the screen while talking, using his hands to emphasize points about the screen size and battery life. (7) Close-up of a white magnetic charging puck and cable, followed by the watch snapping onto the charger and displaying a green circular charging animation. (8) Screen capture of an iPhone health app interface showing sleep and respiratory data, followed by a close-up of the watch face showing a sleep score of 84. (9) The man appears in the bottom center giving a peace sign with both hands, while three different watch face designs are displayed in a grid above him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 欸! 我的Apple Watch Ultra 3來了. (2) [Variety]: 我的Apple Watch Ultra 3. (3) [Subtitle]: 你看! 這是我的Apple Watch Ultra 2. (4) [Variety]: 這是我的Apple Watch Ultra 2. (5) [Subtitle]: 今天會跟你講一下它們的差異在哪. (6) [Subtitle]: 還是先開箱它. (7) [Variety]: 錶原色. (8) [Subtitle]: 錶原色! 欸! 太原太色! (9) [Subtitle]: 然後呢我自己也額外買了一個. (10) [Subtitle]: 你看! 我這樣就有兩個新錶帶. (11) [Subtitle]: 你看! 新錶帶是不是很好看. (12) [Variety]: 越野錶環. (13) [Subtitle]: 欸! 這次呢! 表面縮減, 縮減了邊框. (14) [Variety]: 表面縮減 邊框縮減. (15) [Variety]: Ultra 3 1.98吋. Ultra 2 1.92吋. (16) [Subtitle]: 所以你看Ultra 2才1.92吋而已喔. (17) [Subtitle]: 0到80% Ultra 3只要45分鐘. (18) [Variety]: 0~80% Ultra 3只要45分鐘. (19) [Subtitle]: 但是Ultra 2需要60分鐘. (20) [Variety]: Ultra 2需要60分鐘. (21) [Subtitle]: 但是喔! 這一次呢! 所附新的快充充電線. (22) [Subtitle]: 它呢讓Ultra 3只要充電15分鐘就可以用12小時. (23) [Variety]: 16 週二 11:15. (24) [Subtitle]: 而且喔! 衛星通訊! (25) [Variety]: 衛星通訊. (26) [Subtitle]: 就是你沒有訊號的地方一樣可以使用. (27) [Subtitle]: 而且它的續航最長可以達到42小時. (28) [Variety]: 42小時. (29) [Subtitle]: 未來會增加高血壓偵測. (30) [Variety]: 未來會增加高血壓偵測 *此功能待軟體更新. (31) [Subtitle]: 跟呼吸中止症. (32) [Variety]: 呼吸中止症. (33) [Subtitle]: 除此之外還有一個睡眠評分. (34) [Subtitle]: 睡眠評分很重要! 會幫你打分數. (35) [Subtitle]: 而且它這次還增加了兩個新錶盤喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (male) present throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a brown newsboy cap, black-rimmed glasses, a dark green t-shirt with a 'Roots Athletics' graphic, and several beaded bracelets.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist indoor studio with light blue-grey paneled walls and soft lighting. A wooden chair is partially visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A confident and energetic male voice begins a professional Mandarin narration with high articulation clarity. An upbeat electronic pop background track with a prominent synthesized beat starts simultaneously. (2) A sharp, crisp mechanical clicking sound is heard as the presenter interacts with the product box. The music maintains a constant high-tempo energy. (3) A digital 'ding' sound effect triggers during the transition to a technical spec reveal. The speaker's pitch variability increases as he highlights key differences. (4) Subtle plastic rustling sounds are layered under the narration as watch bands are handled. The music beat remains strong and rhythmic. (5) A final bright transition sound effect concludes the audio track as the narration finishes with a cheerful sign-off.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Unboxing -> Comparison -> Feature Highlight -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire unboxing and comparison review of the Apple Watch Ultra 3 against the previous generation Ultra 2. It aims to inform tech enthusiasts about specific hardware upgrades like bezel reduction and charging speed, as well as upcoming health software features.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of the product box, detailed specification breakdown, and explicit naming of the brand and model.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media tech content with professional studio audio and fast-paced visual editing designed for high engagement.
